title: S.e.f.a.t.
body:
Sword Enchantments For Axes & Tridents (S.e.f.a.t)

Makes sword enchantments compatabile with axes and trindents

If you want this mod for Neoforge or Forge. There will be a datapack version.

For Quilt you can use the Quilted Fabric API (QFAPI) / Quilt Standard Libraries (QSL).
